data.content:
Now I have the full picture. Here are all the legacy patterns I found:

| # | Legacy Pattern | Modernization |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | Verbose `<Project ToolsVersion="15.0" xmlns="...">` | → `<Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk">` |
| 2 | Explicit `<Import>` of `Microsoft.Common.props` / `Microsoft.CSharp.targets` | → Implicit via SDK |
| 3 | `<TargetFrameworkVersion>v4.7.2</TargetFrameworkVersion>` | → `<TargetFramework>net472</TargetFramework>` |
| 4 | Explicit `<Compile Include="...">` items | → Auto-globbing in SDK |
| 5 | `Properties/AssemblyInfo.cs` | → Project-level `<PropertyGroup>` metadata |
| 6 | Explicit `<Reference>` to `System`, `System.Core`, etc. | → Implicit framework references |
| 7 | Debug/Release `<PropertyGroup>` blocks | → All values match SDK defaults; removable |
| 8 | `ProjectGuid`, `FileAlignment`, `AutoGenerateBindingRedirects`, `Deterministic`, `ErrorReport`, `WarningLevel` | → Defaults or unnecessary in SDK-style |

Let me apply the modernization now.

arguments.old_str:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<Project ToolsVersion="15.0" xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/developer/msbuild/2003">
  <Import Project="$(MSBuildExtensionsPath)\$(MSBuildToolsVersion)\Microsoft.Common.props" Condition="Exists('$(MSBuildExtensionsPath)\$(MSBuildToolsVersion)\Microsoft.Common.props')" />
  <PropertyGroup>
    <Configuration Condition=" '$(Configuration)' == '' ">Debug</Configuration>
    <Platform Condition=" '$(Platform)' == '' ">AnyCPU</Platform>
    <ProjectGuid>{12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012}</ProjectGuid>
    <OutputType>Library</OutputType>
    <RootNamespace>LegacyApp</RootNamespace>
    <AssemblyName>LegacyApp</AssemblyName>
    <TargetFrameworkVersion>v4.7.2</TargetFrameworkVersion>
    <FileAlignment>512</FileAlignment>
    <AutoGenerateBindingRedirects>true</AutoGenerateBindingRedirects>
    <Deterministic>true</Deterministic>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <PropertyGroup Condition=" '$(Configuration)|$(Platform)' == 'Debug|AnyCPU' ">
    <DebugSymbols>true</DebugSymbols>
    <DebugType>full</DebugType>
    <Optimize>false</Optimize>
    <OutputPath>bin\Debug\</OutputPath>
    <DefineConstants>DEBUG;TRACE</DefineConstants>
    <ErrorReport>prompt</ErrorReport>
    <WarningLevel>4</WarningLevel>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <PropertyGroup Condition=" '$(Configuration)|$(Platform)' == 'Release|AnyCPU' ">
    <DebugType>pdbonly</DebugType>
    <Optimize>true</Optimize>
    <OutputPath>bin\Release\</OutputPath>
    <DefineConstants>TRACE</DefineConstants>
    <ErrorReport>prompt</ErrorReport>
    <WarningLevel>4</WarningLevel>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <ItemGroup>
    <Reference Include="System" />
    <Reference Include="System.Core" />
    <Reference Include="System.Data" />
    <Reference Include="System.Xml" />
    <Reference Include="System.Xml.Linq" />
    <Reference Include="Microsoft.CSharp" />
  </ItemGroup>
  <ItemGroup>
    <Compile Include="Calculator.cs" />
    <Compile Include="StringHelper.cs" />
    <Compile Include="Properties\AssemblyInfo.cs" />
  </ItemGroup>
  <Import Project="$(MSBuildToolsPath)\Microsoft.CSharp.targets" />
</Project>
arguments.new_str:
<Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk">

  <PropertyGroup>
    <TargetFramework>net472</TargetFramework>
    <RootNamespace>LegacyApp</RootNamespace>
    <AssemblyName>LegacyApp</AssemblyName>
    <Description>A legacy-style project for modernization testing</Description>
    <Company>TestCo</Company>
    <Product>LegacyApp</Product>
    <Copyright>Copyright © 2024</Copyright>
    <Version>1.0.0.0</Version>
    <AssemblyVersion>1.0.0.0</AssemblyVersion>
    <FileVersion>1.0.0.0</FileVersion>
  </PropertyGroup>

</Project>

data.reasoningText:
Now I have a complete picture. Let me identify all the legacy patterns and modernize the project.

Legacy patterns found:
1. **Non-SDK-style project format** — uses `ToolsVersion`, `xmlns`, explicit `Import` of `Microsoft.Common.props` and `Microsoft.CSharp.targets`
2. **Explicit `<Compile>` items** — SDK-style auto-globs `.cs` files
3. **`Properties/AssemblyInfo.cs`** — SDK-style projects auto-generate assembly info from project properties
4. **Explicit framework references** (`System`, `System.Core`, etc.) — implicit in SDK-style


5. **Debug/Release configurations** — already match SDK defaults, so they're redundant
6. **Legacy properties** like `ProjectGuid`, `FileAlignment`, and `WarningLevel` that are either defaults or unnecessary in modern projects
7. **`TargetFrameworkVersion` v4.7.2** — needs to become `TargetFramework` with `net472`

I'm converting this to an SDK-style project with the simplified structure, removing all the boilerplate and letting the SDK handle the defaults.

Now I need to consolidate the assembly metadata into project properties instead of keeping a separate AssemblyInfo.cs file, and strip out all the explicit item includes since the SDK will auto-discover them.

<Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk">

  <PropertyGroup>
    <TargetFramework>net472</TargetFramework>
    <RootNamespace>LegacyApp</RootNamespace>
    <AssemblyName>LegacyApp</AssemblyName>
    <Description>A legacy-style project for modernization testing</Description>
    <Company>TestCo</Company>
    <Product>LegacyApp</Product>
    <Copyright>Copyright © 2024</Copyright>
    <Version>1.0.0.0</Version>
    <AssemblyVersion>1.0.0.0</AssemblyVersion>
    <FileVersion>1.0.0.0</FileVersion>
  </PropertyGroup>

</Project>

data.content:
**Done.** The project went from 47 lines → 16 lines. Here's what changed:

- **Project root** → `Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk"` (removes explicit `Import` of props/targets)
- **Target framework** → `net472` short-form TFM
- **`Properties/AssemblyInfo.cs`** → deleted; metadata moved to `<PropertyGroup>` (SDK auto-generates assembly attributes)
- **Explicit `<Compile>` items** → removed (SDK auto-globs `**/*.cs`)
- **Framework `<Reference>` items** → removed (implicit with `net472`)
- **Debug/Release PropertyGroups** → removed (all values were SDK defaults)
- **`ProjectGuid`, `FileAlignment`, `Deterministic`, `OutputType`** → removed (defaults or unnecessary; `Library` is the SDK default output type)
